creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking up mx2.freebsd.org:

https://check.spamhaus.org/results?query=96.47.72.81
https://check.spamhaus.org/results?query=2610:1c1:1:606c::19:2

96.47.72.81 has no issues
2610:1c1:1:606c::19:2 has no issues

Looks like your resolver is blocked from Spamhaus (etc).  mx2.freebsd.org is fine.
